## 6. Recommended Focus for Next Cycle

**Cycle 1 (first build):** Lock either Morning Spark (morning-briefing domain, cleanest
minimal O-R-A loop) or Study Prep Agent (learning-research, richer planning step). Both
pass all five Agency Gates. Target SDK rungs 1–2. Focus trait: observe–reason–act feedback
loop — watch the agent change its search/fetch strategy after observing a result.

Health-habits domain (Focus Booster) is deferred until the probe-tool fix is applied.
